title: Immediate Requirement Logistics Manager at AirAsia Cargo India

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Logistics Manager at AirAsia Cargo India
jsonLd.description:
Join the AirAsia Cargo India family as a Logistics Manager in Kochi. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About AirAsia Cargo India:
AirAsia Cargo India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Flexible working hours
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with AirAsia Cargo India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
